title: Managing Compliance
description: Work your reviewer inbox, create and review obligations with evidence, build your asset hierarchy, and configure your footprint.

steps.caption: Your compliance cockpit
steps.narration: The Comply tab is your compliance cockpit — one view of your reviewer inbox, obligations, asset hierarchy and footprint.

steps.caption: The reviewer inbox
steps.narration: The reviewer inbox lists every obligation waiting on you, so nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.caption: Create an obligation
steps.narration: Create an obligation by pinning a regulation to one of your assets, then set its severity and compliance status.

steps.caption: Attach evidence
steps.narration: Reviewers attach evidence — a photo or a document — and Vantage's AI helps evaluate it.

steps.caption: Review and sign off
steps.narration: Then they sign off through the workflow, with a full audit trail.

steps.caption: Build your asset hierarchy
steps.narration: Build your asset hierarchy — sites, units and equipment — from the ISO 14224 starter pack, so each obligation attaches to the exact asset it governs.

steps.caption: Configure your footprint
steps.narration: Configure your operations footprint — geographies, industries, substances, and the regulators and topics you monitor. That footprint is what scores your Relevance Feed.
